title: bot: NIE_TEXT limit is chars not bytes — comment misleads
description: bot/src/main.rs:169-174: safe_text is limited by .take(1024) on .chars() iterator — this is 1024 Unicode scalar values, which could be up to 4096 bytes for multi-byte chars. Comment says '1024 bytes'. The limit is bytes-length agnostic, so a 1024-emoji message (4096 bytes) passes through. Hook processes/scripts may not handle 4KB env var values well. Either fix the comment to say 'chars' or change the limit to bytes using a byte-length check.
